rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass, improving the text's clarity and flow without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainties and provided possible corrections, ensuring transparency about potential issues.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope, addressing all points effectively without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the changes are safe and accurate.
rationale.RX.5: While major edits were explained, not every change was annotated with sources, falling short of the highest standard.
